center.name: 里韦拉省
center.summary: 里韦拉省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Orange-breasted thornbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-breasted thornbird is found in southeastern Brazil from Minas Gerais and Espírito Santo south to Rio Grande do Sul. It was discovered in Uruguay in 2001, including signs of breeding (a nest), in Rivera Department near the Brazilian border, and has been found regularly in other sites ever since.Azpiroz, A
